tuning: E A D G B E
content:
No capo.

[ch]C#m[/ch]: 446654/446454
[ch]A[/ch]:   x02220/x02200
[ch]E[/ch]:   022100
[ch]B[/ch]:   x24442/x24440

Intro: [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] (alternate plucking, up to you which ever sounds right)

[tab]                    [ch]C#m[/ch]
I was thinkin about her, thinkin about me.[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]
Thinkin about us, what we gonna be?[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]E[/ch]                            [ch]B[/ch]
Open my eyes, yeah it was only just a dream.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C#m[/ch]
So I travel back, down that road.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]
Who she come back? No one knows.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]                            [ch]B[/ch]  
I realize, yeah, it was only just a dream.[/tab]

[tab] [ch]C#m[/ch]
I was at the top and I was like Im at the basement.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]A[/ch]
Number one spot and now she found her a replacement.[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]E[/ch]                             [ch]B[/ch]
I swear now I can't take it, knowing somebody's got my baby.[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C#m[/ch]                                 [ch]A[/ch]
And now you ain't around, baby I can't think.[/tab]
[tab]                                     [ch]E[/ch]
Shoulda put it down. Shoulda got that ring.[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]B[/ch]
Cuz I can still feel it in the air.[/tab]
      
See her pretty face run my fingers through her hair.
  
[tab]   [ch]C#m[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
My lover, my life. My shorty, my wife.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]               
She left me, I'm tied.[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]B[/ch]
Cuz I knew that it just ain't right.[/tab]


[tab]  [ch]C#m[/ch]
I was thinkin about her, thinkin about me.[/tab]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]
Thinkin about us, what we gonna be?[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]                             [ch]B[/ch]
Open my eyes, yeah; it was only just a dream.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C#m[/ch]           
So I travel back, down that road.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]
Who she come back? No one knows.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]                                [ch]B[/ch]
I realize, yeah, it was only just a dream.[/tab]


[tab]   [ch]C#m[/ch]
When I be ridin man I swear I see her face at every turn.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]A[/ch]
Tryin to get my usher over, I can let it burn.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]E[/ch]                                                 [ch]B[/ch]
And I just hope she notice she the only one I yearn for.[/tab]

Oh I miss her when will I learn?


[tab] [ch]C#m[/ch]                           
Didn't give her all my love, I guess now I got my payback.[/tab]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]
Now I'm in the club thinkin all about my baby.[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]E[/ch]                                  [ch]B[/ch]
Hey, she was so easy to love. But wait, I guess that love wasn't enough.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C#m[/ch]
I'm goin through it every time that I'm alone.[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]A[/ch]
And now i'm missin, wishin she'd pick up the phone.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]E[/ch]
But she made a decision that she wanted to move one.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]B[/ch]
Cuz I was wrong.[/tab]

[tab]                    [ch]C#m[/ch]
And I was thinkin about her, thinkin about me.[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]A[/ch]

[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]                              [ch]B[/ch]

[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]                                [ch]B[/ch]

[tab]    [ch]C#m[/ch]

[tab]                  [ch]E[/ch]                                        [ch]B[/ch]
